faqs.answer: Yes, Snyk offers a Free tier for up to 5 projects with no credit card required.

faqs.answer: The Team plan starts at $25/month per contributing developer, billed monthly.

faqs.answer: Yes, in addition to code and open source dependency scanning, Snyk offers Snyk Container and Snyk IaC products.

faqs.question: Can Snyk integrate with AI coding tools?
faqs.answer: Yes, Snyk integrates with AI coding assistants including Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.

use_cases.title: Securing open source dependencies

use_cases.title: Container and IaC hardening
use_cases.description: Platform teams check container images and infrastructure-as-code templates for misconfigurations.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Snyk?
paragraphs: Snyk is a developer security platform that scans application code, open source dependencies, containers, and infrastructure-as-code for vulnerabilities. It integrates into IDEs, source code managers, and CI/CD pipelines so issues can be caught before deployment.
The platform also connects with AI coding assistants such as Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex to validate AI-generated code as it is written.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Snyk is for
paragraphs: Snyk is aimed at development and AppSec teams that need vulnerability scanning across the full software stack, from a single free-tier developer up to enterprise organizations needing custom security rules and dedicated support.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Semgrep?
paragraphs: Semgrep is an application security platform that combines static analysis (SAST), software composition analysis (SCA), and secrets detection to find and help remediate vulnerabilities before deployment.
It uses a mix of rule-based analysis and AI reasoning, including reachability analysis for dependencies and a triage memory that suppresses repeat false positives.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Semgrep is for
paragraphs: Semgrep serves developers who want fast, integrated security feedback as well as AppSec teams and CISOs who need centralized visibility across code and dependency risk.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is SonarQube Cloud?
paragraphs: SonarQube Cloud (formerly SonarCloud) is a cloud-based code quality and security platform that scans source code in real time to find bugs, vulnerabilities, code smells, and architectural issues.
It integrates with CI/CD pipelines and Git providers to give pull request feedback and enforce quality gates before code ships, and is used by over 7 million developers according to the vendor.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who SonarQube Cloud is for
paragraphs: It serves individual developers and small teams on the free tier, as well as enterprise organizations in healthcare, financial services, retail, and government that need compliance reporting and custom annual plans.

paragraphs: Aikido Security is an application security platform that unifies code scanning (SAST, SCA, secrets), cloud security posture management, and runtime protection into a single dashboard.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Aikido Security is for

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Infisical?
paragraphs: Infisical is an open-source platform that combines secrets management, certificate (PKI) management, and privileged access management so teams don't need separate tools for each.

It supports self-hosting or cloud deployment, integrates with tools like AWS, Kubernetes, GitHub, and Terraform, and includes an Agent Vault feature for giving AI agents scoped access to credentials without exposing the raw secret values.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Infisical is for
